name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Genuine Leather】🧏🏻‍♀️Black with Gun Buckle·
Loulou Puffer mini_Mini Size #23CM Crossbody Bag is here! The entire bag is made of soft Italian lambskin, featuring YSL's diagonal quilted craftsmanship. It has a soft front flap pocket, a detachable shoulder strap, and can be used as a storage bag or an underarm bag with the adjustable buckle, easily achieving multi-purpose use!
Size: 23×15.5×8.5cm
Model: 620333
